response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song title 'Beautiful World (2024 Mix)' from on-screen text in the first scene (Aki Rosenthal). Performer: Aki Rosenthal. Original Artist: Hikaru Utada.
2. Searched for '"Beautiful World" Hikaru Utada Japanese and English lyrics'. Found lyrics.
3. Identified song title '桜のあと(all quartets lead to the?)' from on-screen text in the second scene (Shirakami Fubuki). Performer: Shirakami Fubuki. Original Artist: UNISON SQUARE GARDEN.
4. Searched for '"桜のあと" "UNISON SQUARE GARDEN" Japanese and English lyrics'. Found lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features a two-song medley. The first segment showcases a solo performance by Aki Rosenthal of 'Beautiful World', followed by a second segment showcasing a performance by Shirakami Fubuki of '桜のあと(all quartets lead to the?)'.

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal performs 'Beautiful World (2024 Mix)'. The song title appears on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
It's only love
It's only love
もしも願い一つだけ叶うなら
君の側で眠らせて
どんな場所でもいいよ
Beautiful world
迷わず君だけを見つめている
Beautiful boy
自分の美しさ まだ知らないの
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's only love
It's only love
If I am granted only one of my wishes
Let me sleep by your side, anywhere is okay
Beautiful world
Without losing sight, I am looking only at you
Beautiful boy
You still don't know your own beauty.

scenes.description: Shirakami Fubuki performs '桜のあと(all quartets lead to the?)'. The song title and composer credits appear on-screen.
scenes.song_title: 桜のあと(all quartets lead to the?)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
やあ また会えたね
こんばんは いや こんにちはだっけ?
じゃじゃじゃじゃーん 足りない!
キック、リズムを打て!
歌うよ、でたらめでいいよね?
All quartets lead, lead to…? say la-la-la...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Yay, we met again.
Good evening, or was it good afternoon?
Ta-da! Not enough!
Kick, hit the rhythm!
I'll sing it, it's okay if it's nonsense, right?
All quartets lead, lead to…? say la-la-la...
